title: Alibaba
actors: Sadhona Bose, Bibhuti Ganguly, Suprava Mukherjee
plot: Based on the 'Arabian Nights', this film tells of the Baghdadi woodcutter Alibaba (M. Bose) and his magic 'Open Sesame' formula; of the hero's jealous brother Kasim and the slave girl Marjina (S. Bose). The film adapts the 1897 pl...
